Interface OpenApi3xHeader

All Superinterfaces:
Node, OpenApiHeader, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi30Header, OpenApi31Header, OpenApi32Header
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30HeaderImpl, OpenApi31HeaderImpl, OpenApi32HeaderImpl
public interface OpenApi3xHeader extends OpenApiHeader
